heading: Imposition of tax
label: 4371 Imposition of tax
notes: Amendments1989—Par. (2). struck out “, unless the insurer is subject to tax under section 842(b)” after “or annuity contract”.Pub. L. 101–2391987—Par. (2). substituted “section 842(b)” for “section 813”.Pub. L. 100–2031984—Par. (2). substituted “section 813” for “section 819”.Pub. L. 98–3691976— substituted in par. (1) “4 cents” for “four cents” and “premium paid” for “premium charged”, in pars. (2) and (3) “1 cent” for “one cent” and “premium paid” for “premium charged”, and struck out provision following par. (3) relating to computation of tax on premium paid in lieu of premium charged.Pub. L. 94–4551965— inserted last sentence relating to computation of tax on premium paid in lieu of premium charged.Pub. L. 89–441959—Par. (2). substituted “section 819” for “section 816”.Pub. L. 86–691958— substituted “is hereby imposed, on each policy of insurance, indemnity bond, annuity contract, or policy of reinsurance issued by any foreign insurer or reinsurer, a tax” for “shall be imposed a tax on each policy of insurance, indemnity bond, annuity contract, or policy of reinsurance issued by any foreign insurer or reinsurer”.Pub. L. 85–8591956—Par. (2). Act , substituted “section 816” for “section 807”.Mar. 13, 1956

children.heading: Casualty insurance and indemnity bonds
children.label: 1 Casualty insurance and indemnity bonds
children.text: 4 cents on each dollar, or fractional part thereof, of the premium paid on the policy of casualty insurance or the indemnity bond, if issued to or for, or in the name of, an insured as defined in section 4372(d);

children.heading: Life insurance, sickness, and accident policies, and annuity contracts
children.label: 2 Life insurance, sickness, and accident policies, and annuity contracts
children.text: 1 cent on each dollar, or fractional part thereof, of the premium paid on the policy of life, sickness, or accident insurance, or annuity contract; and

children.heading: Reinsurance
children.label: 3 Reinsurance
children.text: 1 cent on each dollar, or fractional part thereof, of the premium paid on the policy of reinsurance covering any of the contracts taxable under paragraph (1) or (2).
